changelog: Added 'ssh' command for SSH key pair generation and management.
SSH keys are stored by name in the database with public key content and fingerprint.
Added 'ssh cat' subcommand to display public keys for quick copying.
Added 'ssh list' subcommand to show all stored keys in an aligned table.
Added 'ssh delete' subcommand with optional --files flag to remove key files from disk.
Added 'ssh config' subcommand to regenerate managed ~/.ssh/config Host entries.
Auto-manages ~/.ssh/config with marker-bounded Host entries for multi-key setups.
Added '--ssh-key' / '-K' flag to 'clone' command for SSH key-based cloning via GIT_SSH_COMMAND.
Added shell tab-completion for SSH subcommands and key names (PowerShell, Bash, Zsh).
Added SSH documentation page to the docs site.
